citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 9:30 AM on
4/23/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, texting and calling the licensee
phone number. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 9:30 AM on 
4/23/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, texting and calling the licensee 
phone number. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
